details: Started Postgres container via docker compose.
Restarted backend service with DB connectivity restored.
Added [DROP_RECEIVED], [UPLOAD_STARTED], [UPLOAD_SUCCESS], [UPLOAD_FAILED] diagnostics in frontend upload paths.
Added [STORE_WRITE], [STORE_UPDATE] diagnostics in backend ingest and frontend store sync.
Added [VAULT_RENDER], [VAULT_ITEM_COUNT], [VIDEO_RENDER], [IMAGE_RENDER] diagnostics in Vault render layer.
Preserve extension for .png/.webp/.gif/.jpeg in image-only ingest path.
Persist matching mime_type instead of hardcoded image/jpeg.
Validated new WebP upload persists as .webp with mime_type image/webp in reels table.
